name: The Syndicate Accountant
text:
Whenever you would create one or more Favor tokens, create that many plus one instead. He finds a debt nobody remembered incurring, every single time.
{4}, {T}: Audit the table. Each opponent reveals their hand; for each card revealed, you may sacrifice a Favor token to make them discard it. Receipts, please.
flavorText: He does not commit crimes. He merely makes them add up.
